items.name_en: Ohanel 24A duma Backpack Starlight Purple Large Stock Available | Real Photos
items.name_cn:
Ohanel 24A duma Backpack Starlight Purple Large Stock Available | Real Photos
🫶First glance is beautiful, second glance you're obsessed🫶The vintage duma is in high demand, no need to say more🤟This duma has two more pockets than the previous one, adding a biker and cool vibe, making it more casual and laid-back😎The leather is durable calfskin, who can resist?This comes in two sizes, small and large🆚The small one is exquisite and compact, the large one is not too big, just right👌The capacity is huge, phones and daily essentials are no problem, and the two front pockets are really useful!Even a compact powder case fits!!🤟🤟If you hesitate for a second, it might be gone🔥Buy it buy it buy it❗️❗️❗️
(16.5*17.5*10cm)
(21*20*12cm)

items.name_en: In Stock: Chane🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
items.name_cn:
In Stock: Chane🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
To be honest ❤️This is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations!Classic double C logo, quilted pattern paired with gold metal, leather chain strap, full of texture. The lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and cherish it!It can be used in all four seasons and suits any style💃It must be in your handbag collection
Small: Dimensions 17× 7× 15cm
Number: A2211

items.name_cn:
In Stock Chane🎶Vintage Double C Backpack Cowhide Ball Print
The highlight of this bag is its large double C logo, rare, niche and special ❤️
No need to worry about matching bags, the design is simple and elegant, the cowhide pebbled texture is very durable. Huge capacity, built-in small pocket is thoughtful, and the weight is nice too. Dimensions Length 31 Width 11 Height 34

items.name_en: 🔮🔮🔮OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Calfskin Custom Leather, super retro in person. My favorite autumn/winter suede Chanel. It's firmly number one in my heart because it's so unique and rare. Chocolate brown with double pockets and a chain strap. This was the first Chanel that attracted me to the brand. It gathers all the suede styles I love. Crossbody tote, adjustable chain ⛓️. These five major elements appear in many similar styles, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain allows for a shoulder bag style. Lightweight, fits a laptop + iPad! Dimensions: 28x12.5x24cm

items.name_en: In stock 25c HOBO Bag. A hit this season that caught my eye at first glance. Adjustable chain transforms into a bucket bag. Medium size, very practical. Two small pockets on the front for travel, perfect for phone and passport. Large capacity, looks cool when worn! Dimensions: 30*26*14*cm

items.name_en: Classic and timeless, this Chanel white quilted bag is a fashion favorite. Black and white contrast outlines a refined silhouette, the iconic double-C logo exudes luxury, and paired with a sparkling chain, it's eye-catching whether worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Carry it to effortlessly navigate the city; every step is a focal point. Model 4515. Dimensions 11.5*18.5*11.
